commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But the transgressors shall be destroyed together: the end of the wicked shall be cut off. Augustine of Hippo 15. "But the transgressors shall be destroyed in the self-same thing" (ver. What is meant by, "in the self-same thing". It means for ever: or all together in one and the same destruction. "The remainder of the wicked shall be cut off. " Now there is "(a remainder) for the man that maketh peace:" they therefore who are not peace-makers, are ungodly. For, "Blessed are the peace-makers: for they shall be called the children of God.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Together. At the last day, (Haydock) or all without exception shall perish; the wicked, with their posterity and riches. (Worthington)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
